posts.text: I listened to the Q4 con call, the arrogance of Siddarth is still intact despite bad performance since last 3 years. The way he is giving 1 or 2 word answers reflects his arrogance. such arrogance runied the once famous @laxmiorganic , Dreamfolks as well. I got some shares in IPO and sold @100 % profits, i though 1200 is good area of accumulation but now its b/w 700-800. Even there are some spikes in Q4, what i can sence from the call is still feel lot of headwinds are there due to pricing and competativeness issues. One good thing is that even there is not much growth in the topline, they are…
